prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 449cc liquid-cooled DOHC 5-valve (4T) **YZ450F-derived (ENGINE CODE: YZ450F-M)** with a **GYTR (Genuine Yamaha Racing Technology) big-bore kit (475cc)**, featuring forged Wiseco pistons (13.5:1 compression), Carrillo connecting rods, and a billet aluminum cylinder with Nikasil coating for extreme durability in rally conditions.

Fuel System: Install a **Keihin FCR-MX 41mm flat-slide carburetor** with a **Boyesen Supercooler radiator wing** and **Moto Tassinari VForce4 reed valve system** to optimize airflow and throttle response for high-altitude rally stages, paired with a **Yamaha Power Tuner ECU reflash** (specific to the YZ450F-M engine) for precise fuel mapping.

Suspension: Upgrade to **Öhlins TTX22M 48mm twin-tube rally-spec front forks** with **3-way adjustable compression/rebound damping** and **200mm travel**, paired with a **rear Öhlins TTX36 shock** featuring a **remote reservoir** and **adjustable preload via hydraulic adjuster** for Dakar-level terrain. Chassis reinforcement via **Yamaha GYTR subframe brace** and **Scotts Performance steering stabilizer**.
estetica: Bodywork: Replace stock plastics with **Acerbis X-Seamless rally fairings** in high-visibility **Yamaha Racing Blue (PMS 285C)**, featuring **integrated GPS/navigation pod mounts** and **quick-release Dzus fasteners** for rapid service access. Add **carbon fiber Acerbis X-Treme handguards** with **aluminum reinforcements** for rock protection.

Lighting: Install **Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods** (50W, 5000-lumen) in a **dual-row configuration** with **aluminum CNC-machined mounts** bolted to the **Yamaha GYTR rally tower**, paired with a **Baja Designs S2 Pro amber fog light** for dust penetration. Wiring harness upgraded to **Baja Designs 10-circuit OEM-grade loom** with **waterproof Deutsch connectors**.

Ergonomics: Replace stock seat with a **Seat Concepts Tall Rally seat** (20mm taller, **closed-cell foam density 80kg/m³**) wrapped in **gripper-textured marine-grade vinyl**, paired with **Renthal Twinwall handlebars (997 bend, 827mm width)** and **CRG 921B rally-spec brake/clutch levers** with **adjustable reach and folding design**. Footpegs upgraded to **IMS Superstock Pro pegs (titanium, 120mm width)** with **replaceable traction pins**.
